description:
After .22.17 lands the per-dir layout, expand the golden set to every fixture for which 'fz dump --emit clif' and 'fz dump --emit specs' succeed.

Goal: every runnable fixture has expected.clif and expected.specs sidecars, checked-in. The golden tests (golden_clif, golden_specs) iterate all such fixtures, not the hardcoded GOLDEN_FIXTURES list of 5.

Plan:
- Replace GOLDEN_FIXTURES constant with auto-discovery: scan fixture dirs, attempt fz dump --emit clif/specs, if 0-exit then record sidecar.
- Run BLESS=1 BLESS_SPECS=1 cargo test golden_clif golden_specs to seed every sidecar.
- Commit the seeded sidecars + the discovery change.
- Fixtures that don't dump (interp-only, deferred, errors) get no sidecar — discovery skips them.

Pure additive: nothing retires yet. expect_clif_* directives stay live and asserted. This commit is the new baseline that .22.19 retires against.

Invariants:
- tests still green
- every newly-seeded sidecar is reviewed in the diff (don't bless blind on a dirty branch)
- non-dumpable fixtures stay skipped, matrix doesn't fail on them
title: fz-ul4.27.22.18: fixtures — bless expected.clif / expected.specs for all runnable fixtures
